name: Cloudgine
short_description: Cloud computing technology company for games, acquired by Epic Games in 2018.
about: Cloudgine was a Scottish technology company that developed cloud computing solutions for video games. Founded in 2012 by Dave Jones, the co-creator of Grand Theft Auto and Lemmings, Cloudgine focused on enabling cloud-based game processing to allow more complex simulations and physics than would be possible on local hardware alone. The company was acquired by Epic Games in January 2018, with its technology and team integrated into Epic's cloud infrastructure efforts.
